headline: DSCSA-grade drug authentication
qron_theme: Teal clinical — sterile precision, biotech luminescence
why: Counterfeit and diverted drugs cost the global pharma industry over $200B a year and put patient safety at risk, while DSCSA compliance demands unit-level serialisation and instant audit readiness that legacy systems struggle to deliver.
value: Every unit dose ships with a branded QRON that resolves to a DSCSA / FDA 21 CFR Part 11 aligned AuthiChain record — protecting patients, simplifying recalls, and turning authentication into a trust-building touchpoint at the pharmacy counter.

headline: Seed-to-sale, lab-to-consumer
qron_theme: Cannabis botanical — emerald greens, trichome frost, living soil earth tones
why: Legal cannabis consumers and dispensaries cannot easily verify seed-to-sale provenance, lab results, or licensed origin, leaving regulated markets exposed to diversion, untested product, and regulator penalties.
value: QRON binds every package to its cultivator licence, lab results, and terpene profile, enabling compliant dispensary scanning, brand loyalty, and regulator-ready audit trails across state lines.

headline: Boutique-to-resale provenance
qron_theme: Gold marble classical — museum grandeur, candlelit prestige
why: Luxury handbags, watches, and fashion are routinely counterfeited and fraudulently resold, leaving maisons, retailers, and secondhand buyers without a trusted chain of custody from boutique to resale.
value: A branded QRON tag indistinguishable from the product's design language anchors every item to an immutable AuthiChain record — protecting resale value, enabling warranty transfer, and giving maisons a direct owner-to-brand relationship at every hand-off.

headline: Provenance that survives resale
qron_theme: Blue glass architecture — gallery-grade, translucent depth
why: Blue-chip art, trading cards, sneakers, and limited drops rely on fragile paper COAs and slabs that can be forged, lost, or decoupled from the piece — destroying value and insurance confidence.
value: Every collectible ships with a QRON tied to an AuthiChain digital twin of the COA, so galleries, auction houses, grading services, and collectors verify provenance with a single scan and keep valuation intact across every sale.

headline: Factory-to-dock signed custody
qron_theme: Industrial steel — machined textures, rotational symmetry, metallic gradients
why: Global supply chains suffer from tamper, substitution, and diversion fraud across dozens of hand-offs, with importers and retailers unable to prove that what left the factory is what reached the dock.
value: Every pallet and carton carries a QRON that signs every custody event — factory, port, customs, DC, retailer — on-chain with GPS and actor identity, flagging tamper attempts in real time and generating full audit trails on demand.
